containers.name: sessions
containers.notes: Session metadata. Embed small messages if expected < 200 messages per session.

containers.name: chatturns
containers.notes: Message records when unbounded; keep text previews small.

containers.name: documents
containers.notes: Store metadata only; actual file content in Blob Storage.

containers.name: indexentries
containers.notes: Pointers from doc chunks to cognitive search/vector index.

containers.name: groupmapping
containers.notes: RBAC mapping; cached in-memory with TTL on app startup.

containers.name: processingjobs
containers.notes: Background pipeline job state; partition by docId for targeted updates.

containers.name: auditlog
containers.notes: Immutable audit events; consider export to blob for long-term retention.

recommendations.maxItemSize: Do not store >2MB in Cosmos. Store vectors in Search or external vector DB.
recommendations.ruGuidance: Start at 400 RU per container for low volume; scale to 1000+ for heavy write workloads.
recommendations.indexing: Add composite indexes for (userId, updatedAt) and for query patterns that filter by status. Use Search for global discovery queries to avoid cross-partition scans.
